title: PMS 444040 Cream Colored Sitting Floppy Pippin Rabbit-30cm (46 cm When Standing) -1 Pc-Extra Soft, Snuggable Toys, Adorable Playtime Companion for Kids & Collector, Multicolor
features: IRRESISTIBLE DESIGN: Experience the charm of our sitting floppy pippin rabbit, featuring embroidered eyes and a stylish, printed satin ribbon - a lovable companion that appeals to all ages.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Made with soft, durable materials that ensure long-lasting enjoyment, our pippin rabbit is expertly crafted using premium plush fabric and top-quality stuffing, perfect for hugs and cuddles.
EASY TO CLEAN: Care for your sitting floppy pippin rabbit with ease, as it is fully machine washable on a gentle cycle, providing a lasting and hygienic friend for your family and friends.

PERFECT GIFT OPTION: Whether it's for a birthday, holiday, or a simple gesture of love, our sitting floppy pippin rabbit makes a thoughtful and charming present for people of all ages, bringing comfort and joy to their lives.

VERSATILE SIZES: Measuring 30cm in its sitting position and 46cm when standing, this rabbit provides the ideal size for both cuddling and playing, making for endless hours of imaginative fun for children.
description: Meet your new cuddly companion the cream colored sitting floppy pippin rabbit! Sized at a huggable 30cm when sitting (and an impressive 46cm when standing), this adorable rabbit is the perfect addition to any playtime or collection. Crafted from the most indulgent materials, our floppy pippin rabbit is extra soft and snuggly, ready to be embraced at bedtime or become a trusted sidekick in daytime adventures. With its endearing features and high-quality build, it's not simply a toy, but a treasured part of your child's memories. It's also an excellent piece for collectors who appreciate the charm and craftsmanship of quality plush toys.
